scenes.description: Transition sequence showing hololive members and the "2nd STAGE" logo.
Vestia Zeta and Kobo Kanaeru perform "id:entity voices".

subtitles.original: Bow wow wow wow
subtitles.english: Bow wow wow wow

subtitles.original: Tell me how you like me now
subtitles.english: Tell me how you like me now

subtitles.original: Let’s celebrate the New Year!
subtitles.english: Let’s celebrate the New Year!

subtitles.original: Come and watch me, watch me, watch me
subtitles.english: Come and watch me, watch me, watch me

subtitles.original: Let your voice go and show you how to lose control
subtitles.english: Let your voice go and show you how to lose control

subtitles.original: You’ve got the free on your mind
subtitles.english: You’ve got the free on your mind

subtitles.original: Leave all your sense behind
subtitles.english: Leave all your sense behind

subtitles.original: Be outrageous, the chaos is contagious
subtitles.english: Be outrageous, the chaos is contagious

subtitles.original: Come on, you know what time it is
subtitles.english: Come on, you know what time it is

subtitles.original: It’s our Genesis!
subtitles.english: It’s our Genesis!

subtitles.original: Time to open up your eyes
subtitles.english: Time to open up your eyes

subtitles.original: Feel the music start to rise
subtitles.english: Feel the music start to rise

subtitles.original: Got to break the world and let me in
subtitles.english: Got to break the world and let me in

subtitles.original: I know I was meant to be
subtitles.english: I know I was meant to be

subtitles.original: Living life so fast and free
subtitles.english: Living life so fast and free

subtitles.original: Try and keep your eyes on me
subtitles.english: Try and keep your eyes on me

subtitles.original: This is our beginning
subtitles.english: This is our beginning

subtitles.original: This is our Genesis!
subtitles.english: This is our Genesis!

subtitles.original: Whispers blowing down your window
subtitles.english: Whispers blowing down your window

subtitles.original: Rumours reaching a crescendo
subtitles.english: Rumours reaching a crescendo

subtitles.original: No humble beginning
subtitles.english: No humble beginning

subtitles.original: Authentic amazing
subtitles.english: Authentic amazing

subtitles.original: I’m sure you’ve heard of me by now
subtitles.english: I’m sure you’ve heard of me by now

subtitles.original: Midnight, join me to the bright side
subtitles.english: Midnight, join me to the bright side

subtitles.original: Daylight, take me on a joyride
subtitles.english: Daylight, take me on a joyride

subtitles.original: My crime is my passion
subtitles.english: My crime is my passion

subtitles.original: A mayhem in action
subtitles.english: A mayhem in action

subtitles.original: I know what day it is
subtitles.english: I know what day it is

subtitles.original: This is our Genesis!
subtitles.english: This is our Genesis!

subtitles.english: You know what time it is?

subtitles.original: It’s our Genesis!
subtitles.english: It’s our Genesis!

subtitles.english: Tell me what time it is.

subtitles.original: It’s our Genesis!
subtitles.english: It’s our Genesis!

subtitles.english: You know what time it is?

subtitles.original: It’s our Genesis!
subtitles.english: It’s our Genesis!

subtitles.original: Tell me what time it is.
subtitles.english: Tell me what time it is.

subtitles.original: It’s our Genesis!
subtitles.english: It’s our Genesis!

subtitles.original: 君に届けたい id:entity voices
subtitles.english: I want to reach you, id:entity voices

subtitles.original: 踏み出した一歩を 踏み出した
subtitles.english: I've taken a step, I've taken it

subtitles.original: おはよう こんばんは 世界に叫んでみよう
subtitles.english: Good morning, good evening, let's shout to the world

subtitles.original: 本日のライブでは どれの自分を見せるの？
subtitles.english: In today's live, which self will I show?

subtitles.original: 迷い 葛藤 悩んで 好きな自分になれない
subtitles.english: Wandering, struggling, worrying, I can't become the self I like

subtitles.original: そしてある日 誰かに言われた
subtitles.english: And then one day, someone told me

subtitles.original: 「痛い言葉なんてに 迷っていたいた」
subtitles.english: "I was lost in such painful words"

subtitles.original: いつも作る笑顔 失わないように
subtitles.english: So as not to lose the smile I always put on

subtitles.original: これ以上 期待を裏切らないと決めた
subtitles.english: I've decided not to disappoint anymore

subtitles.original: 溢れている 雑踏の中 この声 響けるか
subtitles.english: In the overflowing crowd, can this voice reach?

subtitles.original: 心に 宿る声を 聴いてみてほしいな
subtitles.english: I want you to try and listen to the voice dwelling in your heart

subtitles.original: これは ずっと 見せたかった自分なんだ
subtitles.english: This is the self I've always wanted to show

subtitles.original: 集まった 声たちが ひとつになる id:entity
subtitles.english: The gathered voices become one, id:entity

subtitles.original: 君が注いで やっとスポットライトに
subtitles.english: Because you poured it in, I'm finally in the spotlight

subtitles.original: 立てるけれど 少しだけ怖くなくなった
subtitles.english: I can stand here, and I've become a little less afraid

subtitles.original: だってもう 一人じゃない 仲間たちがいるんだ
subtitles.english: Because I'm not alone anymore, I have my friends

subtitles.original: 家族みたいな絆で 違いを認め合えた
subtitles.english: With a family-like bond, we could acknowledge our differences

subtitles.original: それぞれも 輝き合って
subtitles.english: Each of us shining together

subtitles.original: ハーモニーを 奏でるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if we'll play a harmony

subtitles.original: 手を繋いで 共に夢の空の方へ
subtitles.english: Let's hold hands, towards the sky of dreams together

subtitles.original: 精一杯 歓声をあげましょう
subtitles.english: Let's give it our all and cheer

subtitles.original: 幸せを 届けるんだ
subtitles.english: We'll deliver happiness

subtitles.original: どこにだって 響けよ
subtitles.english: Let it echo everywhere

subtitles.original: 新しい舞台に飛び込んで
subtitles.english: Jumping into a new stage

subtitles.original: 今幕が開くよ
subtitles.english: Now the curtain rises
